programs.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programs.desc: When Starfleet orders his disassembly for research purposes, Data is thrust into a legal battle to determine if he is entitled to the rights enjoyed by sentient beings; Cmdr. Riker is ordered to advocate against Data.

programs.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programs.desc: Wesley falls for a young planetary ruler whose humanoid form conceals a secret.

programs.title: Star Wars: Episode III -- Revenge of the Sith
programs.desc: It has been three years since the Clone Wars began. Jedi Master Obi-Wan Kenobi (Ewan McGregor) and Jedi Knight Anakin Skywalker (Hayden Christensen) rescue Chancellor Palpatine (Ian McDiarmid) from General Grievous, the commander of the droid armies, but Grievous escapes. Suspicions are raised within the Jedi Council concerning Chancellor Palpatine, with whom Anakin has formed a bond. Asked to spy on the chancellor, and full of bitterness toward the Jedi Council, Anakin embraces the Dark Side.

programs.title: The Librarians
programs.desc: A routine artifact retrieval becomes complicated when the artifact grafts itself to Cassandra; a blizzard forces Stone and Cassandra to take shelter at a mysterious hotel.

programs.title: The Librarians
programs.desc: After seeing a vision of her own death at the hands of a supernatural assassin, Baird attempts to stop the deadly prophecy from coming true.

programs.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programs.desc: Riker's estranged father briefs him for command of a ship; a cultural observance troubles Worf; Riker and his father face off in an anbo-jyutsu match, which is considered to be the ultimate evolution of the martial arts.
